name: Count Good Nodes in Binary Tree
description: Given a binary tree root, a node X is good if in the path from root to X there are no nodes with a value greater than X. Return the number of good nodes in the tree.
constraints: The number of nodes is in [1, 10^5]. -10^4 <= Node.val <= 10^4.

performance.stress_intent: exercise path-maximum propagation on large trees; repeated ancestor rescans are the main slow variant worth rejecting
